voiceover.script: Smuggler Rafe Quinn to team. A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. This chapter centers on contact and contradiction arc teaser video, and your objective is to establish a defensible timeline, pressure test witness statements, and isolate deliberate manipulation. Start with brine-sealed manifest, map every contradiction to clock time, and keep one witness stable while you escalate.
